title: primula villosa subsp. infecta
intro: Primula villosa subsp. infecta, also known as Wild Primrose or Primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Primula villosa subsp. infecta include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Primula villosa subsp. infecta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
